data.title: Tim Walz Says, 'It's Okay To Be Successful,' But 'Don't Be A Greedy Bastard And Not Pay Your Taxes'
Ray Dalio Foresees Economic Crisis Worse Than Recession: 'I'm Worried About Something Worse Than A Recession, If This Isn't Handled Well'
data.description: In a recent interview, Ray Dalio, the founder of Bridgewater Associates, expressed his apprehension about a possible economic crisis that could surpass a recession if the current economic policies are not managed effectively.

data.title: Apple Escapes Supply Chain Crisis As Trump Excludes Popular Electronics From Tariffs
data.description: Apple has managed to dodge a potential disaster as its key consumer electronics have been exempted from the 125% tariffs on goods manufactured in China by President Trump.

data.title: Andrew Yang Wonders, 'If Something Goes Down 10% And Then Up 10%, Are You Back Where You Started?'
Mark Cuban Gets Real About What It Takes To Get Rich: 'Even When I Was Dead Broke Sleeping on the Floor, I Was Having Fun'
data.description: Billionaire and Dallas Mavericks owner Mark Cuban once shed light on the common misconceptions about super-rich individuals and the impact of wealth on personal relationships.
